rules: PHASE 1 (Movement): Snapshot positions -> Predators move 1 cell toward their nearest prey (lowest ID), and prey move 1 cell away from their nearest predator (lowest ID). All movement is bounded within [0, config.worldSize - 1].
PHASE 2 (Predation): Predators (sorted by ID) remove one prey (lowest ID) if sharing a cell and gain config.eatingGain.
PHASE 3 (Reproduction): Entities (sorted by ID) with energy >= config.reproThreshold spawn offspring (energy = config.reproCost) and lose config.reproCost.
PHASE 5 (Death): Entities with energy <= 0 are removed from state.
STATUS: Once all ticks are completed, the status is 'FINISHED'.

files.description: CLI entry point. Parses --scenario N and invokes the engine.
Contains the deterministic tick loop and phase logic.
